name: second-brain
description: Knowledge management tools for building and maintaining a Second Brain vault. Three skills: (1) Second Brain Setup & Audit — sets up or audits Obsidian vaults using the Three Brains framework; (2) Knowledge Distill — fetches any URL via Tavily, extracts key ideas, and routes wikilinked notes to the right vault subfolder with thinker profiles; (3) Knowledge Archive — preserves full article text in the vault with a summary header, supporting single-URL, paste-in (zero token cost), and bulk publication-feed scraping with date filtering.
